title: McIver Letter Side 1-A - flight training
description: Scanned image of handwritten letter from William McIver to Anne Duffy during time training in the Army Air Corps during World War II. Contains information about flight training, social constructs and relationships, and reflection of culture and society during wartime.
creator: McIver, William; Fimiani, Christin
subject: Letters; Family Records; World War, 1939-1945
